ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shark_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shark species */,
  "shark_species" TEXT /* Name of the shark species */,
  "attacks" INTEGER /* Total number of attacks recorded */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Total number of fatalities recorded */,
  "attack_probability" REAL /* Probability of an attack occurring */,
  "fatality_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of fatalities to total attacks */,
  "fatality_probability" REAL /* Probability of a fatality occurring */,
  "temp_lo" INTEGER /* Lower temperature limit in degrees Celsius where the species is commonly found */,
  "temp_hi" INTEGER /* Upper temperature limit in degrees Celsius where the species is commonly found */,
  "average_size_ft" REAL /* Average size of the species in feet */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk level assigned to the species based on attack and fatality data */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the shark species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* The conservation status of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* The primary diet of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* The primary habitat of the species */,
  "range" TEXT /* The geographic range where the species is found */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the species data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shark_encounters" (
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shark encounter */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shark species involved in the encounter */,
  "encounter_date" TEXT /* Date of the encounter */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the encounter */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the encounter (e.g., attack, no attack, fatality) */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature at the time of the encounter in degrees Celsius */,
  "shark_size_ft" REAL /* Size of the shark in feet */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or organization reporting the encounter */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the encounter location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the encounter location */,
  "water_conditions" TEXT /* Water conditions at the time of the encounter */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the encounter */,
  "human_activity" TEXT /* Human activity at the time of the encounter */,
  "injured_parts" TEXT /* Parts of the human body injured in the encounter (if applicable) */,
  "injured_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injuries (if applicable) */,
  "witnesses" INTEGER /* Number of witnesses to the encounter */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the encounter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shark_encounters_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES shark_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
